parsed.rationale: The contour lines around waypoint D are labeled with the elevation 6800 ft. Since the contour interval is 40 feet, the next contour line above would be at 6840 ft, and the one below would be at 6760 ft. Waypoint D is located between the 6800 ft and 6840 ft lines, closer to the 6840 ft line, making the elevation approximately 6863 ft.
